title: 2X PEG Solution Preparation
author: Jacquelina Woods
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bycgpstw

steps.title: Store Prepared Solution
steps.instruction: Store the prepared solution at room temperature, protected from light.

steps.title: Dissolve Components
steps.instruction: Dissolve the components (PEG-20000, Sodium Chloride) in approximately 700 mL deionized or ultrapure water. Heating to 50 °C is recommended to facilitate dissolution.

steps.title: Adjust Final Volume
steps.instruction: Bring the total volume up to 1 L with deionized or ultrapure water.
